nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Design system documentation defining CSS design tokens (OKLCH colors, typography, border radii), component specs for buttons, cards, panels, and modals, responsive breakpoints, and interaction patterns for the OriStudio prototype suite.

nodes.name: app.html
nodes.summary: Full dashboard prototype with sidebar navigation, stat cards, work listing panels, monitoring alerts, module tiles, and import/edit modals for managing creative assets.

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Navigation homepage linking to all prototype pages including landing, app dashboard, login, and onboarding.

nodes.name: integrations.html
nodes.summary: Third-party integration center prototype showing connected platform cards and authorization status for content distribution channels.

nodes.name: landing.html
nodes.summary: Marketing landing page with hero section, six feature cards, proof statistics, how-it-works flow, and call-to-action for prospective users.

nodes.name: login.html
nodes.summary: Authentication prototype covering login, register, forgot-password, and 2FA forms with social login buttons and client-side validation animations.

nodes.name: mq7tc56m-OriStudio-完整建设方案.html
nodes.summary: Complete OriStudio construction scheme HTML prototype presenting the full system architecture, module layout, and phased implementation plan.

nodes.name: mq7tc56p-OriStudio-功能架构图.html
nodes.summary: SVG-based functional architecture diagram of OriStudio showing the seven core modules and their interconnections.

nodes.name: mq7tc56p-OriStudio-技术架构图.html
nodes.summary: SVG-based technical architecture diagram of OriStudio showing frontend, backend, database, and infrastructure layers.

nodes.name: onboarding.html
nodes.summary: Five-step interactive onboarding wizard prototype with progress bar, animated slide transitions, and keyboard navigation for new user setup.

nodes.name: settings.html
nodes.summary: Settings prototype covering profile management, API key configuration, notification preferences, security options, and backup controls.
